Early indications point towards suicide, with family members and locals attributing his distress to mounting pressures from land-grab and extortion allegations.

Telangana continues to sizzle, heatwave claims 16 lives in a day
description: Telangana is grappling with an intense heatwave, with at least 16 heat-related deaths reported on Friday across seven districts. The state government has issued a statewide alert, and the IMD warns of severe conditions continuing for three more days. Families of the deceased will receive an ex gratia payment of Rs 4 lakh.

title: Chaos at UP wedding: Ex-lover shows up with cops, newlyweds flee
description: A wedding in Azamgarh turned chaotic when a woman, claiming a long-standing relationship with the groom, arrived with police to halt the ceremony. Despite her allegations, rituals were completed, and the couple fled. Five individuals were taken into custody following the incident and stone-pelting at officers.

title: UP woman ends life after video call with husband; family alleges harassment
description: A 25-year-old woman allegedly died by suicide after an argument with her husband over a video call. Her family claims she was harassed by her husband and in-laws, leading to her returning to her parental home. Police are investigating the allegations of harassment and abetment to suicide.

title: Hyderabad lawyer fighting waqf property cases dies after Scorpio rams him outside home; watch
description: An advocate fighting waqf property encroachment cases was fatally run over by an SUV in Hyderabad. His son alleges two city educationists are behind the murder, citing previous threats and attacks. Police have formed special teams to investigate the incident.

Delhi weather: Relief short-lived, brace for heatwave spell from today
description: A thunderstorm hit Delhi with strong winds, offering brief relief from the heat. Temperatures are rising again, and heatwave conditions are forecast to return from Sunday. Maximum temperatures are expected to increase by 2-3 degrees Celsius over the next four days. Delhi's air quality remains in the moderate category.

Nvidia is also ramping up production for its next-generation 'Vera' CPU and GPU platform, aiming to capture the burgeoning agentic AI sector.

CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
